intro: A draped tent stands at the roadside, lanterns swaying. Inside, a glass orb glows over a worn star-chart.
speaker: Fortune Teller
introDialogue: Come, traveler. The road ahead is not as blind as you fear... let me read what waits for you.
title: The Fortune Teller
description: A roadside seer offers to read the path ahead. She senses {{eventName}} stirring in {{biomeName}}. Hear the prophecy and she will bend fate so it finds you, and mark the place on your map. Or keep your fortune unread and move on.

1.label: Hear the prophecy
1.tooltip:
(+) Foretells the next mystery encounter and forces it to appear
(+) Charts the foreseen biome onto your World Map
1.selected: Her eyes cloud over. "{{eventName}}... in {{biomeName}}. It is written now. Fate will carry you there."

2.label: Decline the reading
2.selected: "Some prefer to meet the road blind. Go well, then."
